full_text_pages.text:
VIDEOS
Indu lagna - the lord of Indu lagna nakshatra should either be OR with an exalted, or debilitated planet
OR retrograde. Even if it’s with a planet in friendly OR own sign - will help.
BCP - DEEPANSHU GIRI - 27th Feb 2019
Example - BCP - 5th house is coming in an year - see which padas are in 5th house and where 5th house
lord has gone and where 5th pada has gone.
then - check the 5th house in navamsha / saptamsha / dasamsha as needed
dasha of planets ruling 6,8th,12th house in dasamsha divisional charts will give problems like -
if dasha of 8th lord of div chart comes - totally new change in job
if dasha of 12th lord of div chart - loss of job
if dasha of 6th lord of div chart comes - struggle
if dasha of planets placed in 6/8/12 in dasamsha comes - problems are still there but lesser in
comparison
Example chart on 28th Feb 2019 - Moumita Nath
Contacted me as she is leaving for USA on March 12th with her husband. Her BCP running year is 27th - which is 3rd
house. Therefore this year should be about displacement, travel etc. The sign lord Jupiter is in the 10th house exalted
with Mercury (12th lord) - job related matters, loss of job, foreign country, displacement etc. Since transit Jupiter is
in 2nd house - so separation from husband is not seen - she is accompanying him.
Jupiter which is the sign lord is also in the nakshatra of Me - 12th lord and both are placed in the 10th house, so job
loss and foreign connection is more stronger. Now, since the Jup and Me conjunction is the 10th house at 24
degrees, so proportionately, the 24th degree means 9th month counted from the last birthday - which is March 2019.
Therefore she is experiencing the event in the month of March 2019.
Padas - D1 shows the 3rd Pada moving to the 5th house
D10 shows the 3rd Pada moving to the 12th house.
CLASS 2 - 5th March 2019
ARUDRA LAGNA ???
Whichever planet is placed in aries will manifest results quickly, because it is the quality of the aries sign.
Venus in scorpio - hidden characteristic in wife. Just the placement of Venus in scorpio will create an
affliction.

Aquarius - rahu and Saturn are lords
Scorpio - ketu and mars are lords
Birth time rectification - D 60
Moon is always involved in all important events. So wherever the moon is active in the BCP year house,
it gives a significant event.
For birth time rectification - According to BCP - advanced part - BCP TECHNIQUE NO. 2
Aquarius - 26 yrs
Pisces - 27yrs
Aries - 28 yrs
Taurus - 29 yrs
Gemini - 30 yrs
Cancer - 31 yrs
Leo - 32 yrs
Virgo - 33 yrs
And So on -
Example
Dec 30th 1988 - Time - 05.06 Ghaziabad
Moon 21 yrs of age - mother (moon natural lord of mother) falls sick. Also because moon is in virgo
(natural sign of sickness)
Since Moon is 9th lord and placed in the 11th which is third from own position, so father may move or get
transferred.
26th year - mother had cancer - see position of mothers planet Saturn from Navamsh
5th house is also reputation. So the year where 5th is linked to 8th - reputation may suffer
Pandit Krishna ashant - lagna darshan - 4 books
AS PER Wherever Ketu is placed - it will give obstruction of that thing that you will like, will give
obsession, will give break, will bend you down - but you won’t get satisfaction in that thing. Or you
won’t get that thing.

Rahu will give obsession and also lot of that thing will come to you
5th lord in 8th - loss in share market if Jupiter is owner of 5th OR placed in 5th.
Also loss of job, loss of position if 10th lord is involved
Rectification Methodology
1. See the event in BCP method 1 and 2 in the rashi sripati chart.
2. See the event in BCP method 1 and 2 in the D 9 sripati chart and look for confirmation
3. See the event in BCP method 1 and 2 in the D 60 sripati chart. Rotate the chart to confirm for
previous events and see confirmations
Example Chart on 7th March 2019 - Sapna Madaan - 2.3.1971 17.15 hrs Sirsa Haryana
Father passed away suddenly on the 23rd Nov 2018. AD - Ketu. Ketu nakshatras in 1/5/9 = self / kids /
father
Ketu in 6th house near MEP - father sick and passes away.
Mars is in Ketu’s nakshatra and is therefore giving Ketu’s results. Ketu is afflicting mars (9th lord) natally
and in transit it is passing through the 6th house. It is going to give stress regarding its nakshatras in 1,5
and 9 - all the three.
BCP year is indicating 12th house of losses ruled by cancer. In D1 the moon is in the 9th house - so some
loss connected with father. In D9 also the moon is in the 9th house and is the lord of 8th house seen from
it’s position. Also D9, cancer sign is in the 4th house (mother, death of father) with padas 6 and 8. And
the Moon has gone to the 9th house.
SO THIS MEANS WHATEVER HOUSE IS COMING IN THE BCP TECHNIQUE 1, WE NEED TO OBSERVE THAT
PARTICULAR HOUSE (NOT SIGN) IN THE DIVISIONAL CHARTS AND SEE THE EFFECTS COMING????
The other thing is - the BCP 2nd technique gives us the sign saggittarius. Now since the sign is saggittarius
in the BCP, so we need to see the same sign in the D9 too. If we see the lagna chart, then the
saggittarius contains weak 9th lord Mars aspected by Ketu. If we see the D9, then saggittarius is the 9th
house, whose lord is transiting this year in the 8th house scorpio.
Sagittarius is also the general 9th house of the kalpurush kundli - signifying father.
Example Chart - 8th March 2019 - Gaurav Makol - resigned job suddenly and wants to pursue poker as
full time game
Contacted on 8th March 2019
suddenly Resigned the job - wants to play only poker - question was - should he do that?

Observation : MD lord Mercury retro in pisces at MEP degree
BCP year 37th / Rashi active Capricorn as per BCP method 2
The 37th yr belongs to 1st house - Leo in D1. Leo being 5th house, rules hobby, speculation as it’s 5th sign.
Also Sun is strong in the house itself so that explains the mindset.
D9 - Sun is 3rd lord placed in first. He confirmed that he is changing home soon and moving to another
location in bangalore. Should I consider 1st house in D9 OR should I concentrate on Leo??
D10 - Sun is 11th lord placed in first house in debilitation. However, the first lord Venus is in the 12th
house. However, this condition is since April 2018, why are the effects coming now??
Capricorn sign active - 10th sign placed in 6th house. Harassment at work?
PERSONAL OBSERVATION - to be verified
If a house gets active in a BCP year, the trinal houses may also be active at the same time because
nakshatras are trinal in nature.
Example
Suman Pathikonda 15-05-1971 10-23 am bangalore
Mother passed away 30th Dec 2017
BCP year 47th - 11th house (3 and 7 also active??) - Taurus consisting of Sun and Sat conjunction. Venus
lord of 11th house is in 10th with Mercury
BCP year tech no. 2 - 47th year means scorpio - 5th house, 8th house of natural zodiac
11th March 2019
Progression System from Chandrakala Nadi
1. This is not the routine planetary transit. It is a progression of planet
2. Ra/Ke and retro planets will move in retro motion. Planets that are stationary will not move and
you cannot calculate the progression for them.
3. Planets will stay in each rashi same amount of time in as number of months as in the
mahadasha.
4. For instance, in Vim dasha of moon, moon will stay 10 months in each sign as it’s mahadasha
lasts for 10 years, Venus Mahadasha 20 months in each sign because it’s mahadasha lasts for 20
years.

then finding it’s navamsha. For narrowing down the event, the Navamsha will give the clue.

Shakti Bindu - power supplying point in your chart - whichever planet
comes in contact with this point, the planetary power reaches a high
level. This is not a wealth point. This point will only tell that this person
will rise above others. You can energize and activate this point through
nakshatra or other things.
